result.stdout:
Description:
  Blazor JS Interop Generator - Generate C# wrappers for JavaScript modules

Usage:
  BlazorJsInteropGenerator [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input> (REQUIRED)  Input JavaScript file pattern (supports wildcards like '**/*.js')
  -w, --watch                     Watch for file changes and regenerate automatically [default: False]
  -n, --namespace <namespace>     C# namespace for the generated wrapper [default: BlazorApp.JsInterop]
  --version                       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information
